name: Torch Room
description: This is a large chamber arranged with deliberate symmetry. A broad doorway leads down, suggesting progression by design rather than accident. Overhead, a domed ceiling rises well beyond reach, its perimeter lined with a wooden railing that implies supervision without presence. From that railing, a length of rope hangs down, stopping several feet short of usefulness. At the center of the room stands a white marble pedestal, and resting upon it is an ivory torch, already lit, as though illumination here was considered an approved exception.
